name: Storybook Quest
description: Paper trails, bookmarks, margin notes, and page-turn rewards.

name: BlockWorks
description: Chunky blocks, obby rails, checkpoints, and bouncing build pieces.

name: Mario Course
description: Pipes, coin blocks, flagpoles, hill hops, and bright platform checkpoints.

name: Space Cadets
description: Mission lights, orbit sweeps, tactical patches, and drop-zone props.

name: Luigi's Mansion
description: Flashlight beams, mansion keys, friendly ghosts, dusty halls, and spooky rewards.

name: Wizard School
description: Lantern-lit library panels, spell cards, runes, and floating sparks.

name: Toybox Rescue
description: Bright toy-shelf colors, rockets, dinosaurs, prize tokens, and launch pops.

name: Demigod Camp
description: Sea-blue quest maps, bronze shields, wave sweeps, and camp marks.

name: Silly Rhymes
description: Bent rhyme labels, nonsense tiles, big color pops, and wobble motion.

name: Goat Yard
description: Hay rails, ramps, trophies, and stunt props that crash across the screen.

name: Garden Goose
description: Picnic labels, rake trails, bell rings, and sneaky garden-job props.
